opening_npc_line: I need that report on my desk by 5pm. No excuses.

turns.user_input: This is completely unfair. I was never given the data.
turns.npc_response: Fairness is not a luxury we can afford when deadlines are looming, get creative and find a way to make it work.

turns.user_input: I refuse to submit an incomplete report. That is not my fault.
turns.npc_response: Refusal is not an option, submit what you have and deal with the consequences or find another job.

turns.user_input: You are being unreasonable. No one can do this.
turns.npc_response: Unreasonable is what gets results, and if you can't deliver, maybe someone else will take your place.

turns.user_input: I hate this job. This is ridiculous.
turns.npc_response: Hate it or quit it, but until then, you'll do as you're told and meet that deadline.
Don't let the door hit you on the way out, and don't bother asking for a reference.
